title: Allow to have hidden inactive tasks, and automate their activation
excerpt: i would like to have a board that will serve as a storage for tasks, but its not available to anyone other than the admin. Another board which is based on a template will have automation that on a spec condition, it will…

posts.author: alonsabb (Alon Sabban)
posts.cookedHtml:
i would like to have a board that will serve as a storage for tasks, but its not available to anyone other than the admin. Another board which is based on a template will have automation that on a spec condition, it will copy one of the tasks from the storage board into this board instance. that allows the concept of inactive to active tasks. another option is to create a real inactive task status which is hidden from the instance user… and activates upon automation.

Both offered concepts above are missing… the only way i found is to create a group which i will call “inactive” but that’s a lame solution… there is an option to move from this board to another… but not to copy from a diff board
